basic_details.job_title: APPSC Departmental Tests Exam Date 2026 - Hall Ticket Download & Schedule
basic_details.short_information: This section provides a quick snapshot of all the key details related to the APPSC Departmental Tests May 2026 session, helping candidates get a clear picture at a glance before diving into the specifics.

content_sections.heading: APPSC Departmental Tests May 2026 - Overview
content_sections.text: This section provides a quick snapshot of all the key details related to the APPSC Departmental Tests May 2026 session, helping candidates get a clear picture at a glance before diving into the specifics.

content_sections.heading: APPSC Departmental Tests May 2026 Exam Dates
content_sections.text: The APPSC has confirmed the exact exam window for the May 2026 Departmental Tests session. Understanding the exam schedule helps candidates plan their preparation and travel arrangements well in advance. Exam Start Date: 06 July 2026 (Monday) Exam End Date: 11 July 2026 (Saturday) Total Exam Duration (window): 6 days Mode of Examination: Offline (Written Test at District Centers) Candidates are advised to check their individual hall tickets for the specific date, time, and venue assigned to them, as different papers may be scheduled on different days within this window.

content_sections.heading: How to Download APPSC Departmental Tests May 2026 Hall Ticket
content_sections.text: The APPSC Hall Ticket for the Departmental Tests May 2026 is available for download from 30 June 2026 and will remain accessible until the last day of examinations, 11 July 2026. Follow the steps below to download your admit card without any confusion. Steps to Download the Hall Ticket Visit the official APPSC website: https://psc.ap.gov.in Look for the Hall Ticket Download link under the Departmental Tests section or the notifications area. Click on the link for Departmental Tests May 2026 - Notification No.03/2026. Enter your Registration Number and Date of Birth (or other required credentials) in the login fields. Click Submit to retrieve your hall ticket. Download and print the hall ticket. Keep multiple copies for safety.

content_sections.heading: APPSC Departmental Tests May 2026 Exam Centers
content_sections.text: The APPSC Departmental Tests May 2026 will be conducted across 21 district centers spread throughout Andhra Pradesh. This ensures that candidates from all parts of the state can appear for the exam conveniently without needing to travel to a single location. Exams will be held at district-level centers across all 21 districts of Andhra Pradesh. The specific exam center allocated to each candidate will be mentioned on their respective Hall Ticket. Candidates are advised to visit their exam center one day in advance to avoid last-minute confusion on the exam day.

content_sections.heading: About APPSC Departmental Tests
content_sections.text: The APPSC Departmental Tests are a critical part of career progression for government employees in Andhra Pradesh. These tests are conducted twice a year - in May and November sessions - by the Andhra Pradesh Public Service Commission, headquartered in Vijayawada. These tests are conducted for government employees in various departments of Andhra Pradesh. Passing these departmental tests is often a prerequisite for confirmation in service, promotions, and increments. Different departments have different tests based on their functional requirements. The APPSC conducts these tests with high transparency and releases official notifications on its portal.

content_sections.heading: Key Dates at a Glance - APPSC Departmental Tests May 2026
Official APPSC Links - Departmental Tests May 2026
content_sections.text: Always rely on the official APPSC resources for the most accurate and up-to-date information regarding the Departmental Tests May 2026. Avoid third-party sources for hall ticket downloads or notifications. Official APPSC Website: https://psc.ap.gov.in Official Notification: Click here

faq.question: Q1. When are the APPSC Departmental Tests May 2026 scheduled?
faq.answer: The APPSC Departmental Tests May 2026 are scheduled to be held from 06 July 2026 to 11 July 2026 across 21 district centers in Andhra Pradesh.

faq.question: Q2. When can I download the APPSC Departmental Tests May 2026 Hall Ticket?
faq.answer: Candidates can download their Hall Tickets from 30 June 2026 onwards until the last day of examinations, i.e., 11 July 2026, from the official website psc.ap.gov.in.

faq.question: Q3. What is the official website to download the APPSC Hall Ticket 2026?
faq.answer: The official website to download the APPSC Departmental Tests May 2026 Hall Ticket is https://psc.ap.gov.in.

faq.question: Q4. How many candidates applied for APPSC Departmental Tests May 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 49,117 candidates have applied for the APPSC Departmental Tests May 2026 Session (Notification No.03/2026).

faq.question: Q5. What is the notification number for APPSC Departmental Tests May 2026?
faq.answer: The notification number for the APPSC Departmental Tests May 2026 Session is No.03/2026.
